brain.commentary: The portfolio is tech‑heavy with several high‑beta, high‑volatility names (TSLA, NVDA, crypto) that push the aggregate beta above the target ~1.1. While the equity index longs (SPY, QQQ, DIA) provide a modest long bias, the negative alphas and elevated vol in many flat‑signal stocks suggest fragility, especially in the crypto segment. A modest scaling back (global multiplier 0.85) and small conviction trims on the weaker signals help bring beta and tail risk closer to the desired level.

counsellors.nvidia: **Risk posture:** The mix is tech‑biased (high‑beta, vol ≈ 0.3‑0.4) with a modest long bias in SPY/DIA/QQQ. Crypto adds outsized tail risk (vol > 0.5, negative alphas). Keep overall beta near 1.1
